16 = Temporary Lodging — a short-
term accommodation such as a 
hotel, campground, hostel, cruise 
ship or resort where the patient 
receives care, and which is not 
identified by any other POS code. 
17 = Walk-in Retail Health Clinic — a 
walk-in health clinic, other than 
an office, urgent care facility, 
pharmacy or independent clinic 
and not described by any other
